Rhamnus cathartica, also known as Aalius or Buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree with yellow berries, native to Europe and Asia. The health benefits of Rhamnus cathartica include its potential to support liver and gallbladder health, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve constipation. The bioactive constituents of Rhamnus cathartica include anthraquinones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Rhamnus cathartica include teas, tinctures, and capsules, often used to support digestive health and promote detoxification.
